notes: Consistency is modeled as inverse average L1 distance from team baseline shares.
Adaptability is modeled as average context-to-baseline distance across leading/trailing/tied.

consistency.summary: Closest to this team's baseline shot identity.
Middle-of-the-road profile between typical and extreme games.
Strongest deviation from this team's baseline shot identity.

adaptability.summary: Largest within-game state-conditioned style shifts.
Balanced adaptation signal between the extremes.
Most state-stable profile inside this team's season sample.
